title: Senior Investment Banker at IDFC First Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at IDFC First Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IDFC First Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IDFC First Bank:
IDFC First Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDFC First Bank!
